ABOUT PROJECTS WRITING CONTACT

LOGIC & ARCHITECTURE. THE PORTFOLIO OF OMAR ALVI.

Architecting scalable backend systems and crafting high-performance, intuitive user interfaces.

VIEW PROJECTS
system.ts 
const buildStack = async <T>(
  logic: Backend,
  view: Frontend<T>
): Promise<System<T>> => {
  const db = await Database.connect(process.env.DB_URL);
  return System.integrate({ logic, view, db }).optimize();
};
